name: resolver
title: OCI DNS — VCN Resolver
summary: Manages a VCN's implicit DNS resolver: attached private views, listening (inbound) endpoints, forwarding (outbound) endpoints, and conditional FORWARD rules.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory freeform tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' freeform tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' freeform tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional freeform tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: resolver_id
module.description: OCID of the VCN's implicit DNS resolver (from the VCN's 'dns_resolver_association' / data source oci_core_vcn_dns_resolver_association). OCI creates this with the VCN; this module manages it.

module.name: attached_view_ids
module.description: DNS view OCIDs to attach to the resolver (e.g., outputs of oci/dns/private-views). Order matters: earlier views win on conflicting names.

module.name: listening_endpoints
module.type: map(object({ subnet_id = string listening_address = optional(string) nsg_ids = optional(list(string), []) }))
module.description: Listening endpoints keyed by logical name (on-premises -> VCN resolution; OCI's analogue of an inbound resolver endpoint).

module.name: forwarding_endpoints
module.type: map(object({ subnet_id = string forwarding_address = optional(string) nsg_ids = optional(list(string), []) }))
module.description: Forwarding endpoints keyed by logical name (VCN -> on-premises resolution; OCI's analogue of an outbound resolver endpoint).

module.name: forward_rules
module.type: map(object({ domain_names = list(string) forwarding_endpoint_key = string destination_addresses = list(string) }))
module.description: Conditional forwarding rules keyed by logical name: matching queries exit via the named forwarding endpoint to the destination addresses.

outputs.name: resolver_id
outputs.description: OCID of the managed VCN resolver.

outputs.name: inbound_endpoint_ips
outputs.description: Map of logical listening endpoint name to listening address (targets for on-premises conditional forwarders).

outputs.name: outbound_endpoint_ips
outputs.description: Map of logical forwarding endpoint name to forwarding address.

outputs.name: rule_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical forward rule name to its covered domains (rules live inline on the resolver without standalone OCIDs).
